decoding…

BVZ Replay Viewer

Drag a .bvz replay here, or click to choose one.
Everything runs locally in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

Decodes the BAMZOOKi replay container and renders every part each frame in a 5-camera layout (main view + per-Zook follow cameras). Click a small camera to make the main view follow that style (Both Zooks / Green / Red); right-drag to orbit any view, scroll to zoom. Layout at top-right switches to a single view; Advanced exposes render/colour modes. Click a part in the main view to inspect its decoded fields and raw bytes.

Inspector
File map
Frame
Only works in Layout:single.
Click a part in the scene to inspect it — its definition fields, shape parameters, its position/orientation in the current frame, and the raw bytes behind each.
Load a file to see its byte-level structure.
Load a file to see per-frame header data.
